summary: Iteration 45 - Avatar Bug Fix & Company Edit Feature Testing - ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) generate-avatar endpoint bug fix (UserMessage image_url argument error FIXED by using FileContent), 2) Text-only avatar generation WORKS, 3) Image-to-image avatar generation WORKS, 4) Company edit button appears on hover, 5) Edit form pre-fills with company data, 6) Update saves changes correctly, 7) Cancel returns to normal view. Campaign creation form regression passed.

avatar_bug_fix.description: POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-avatar no longer throws 'UserMessage.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument image_url' error
avatar_bug_fix.fix_details: Changed from using image_url parameter (which UserMessage doesn't accept) to downloading image and passing as FileContent(content_type, file_content_base64)

avatar_text_only_generation.description: Avatar generation without source_image_url works correctly
avatar_text_only_generation.test_response: Successfully generated avatar URL from Supabase storage

avatar_image_to_image_generation.description: Avatar generation with source_image_url (image-to-image) works correctly
avatar_image_to_image_generation.test_response: Successfully generated avatar URL from Supabase storage

company_edit_button.behavior: Pencil icon appears on company card hover

company_edit_form_prefill.description: Clicking edit opens form pre-filled with company name, phone, website
company_edit_form_prefill.title_change: Form shows 'Editar Empresa' instead of 'Nova Empresa'

company_update_save.description: Clicking 'Atualizar Empresa' saves changes to localStorage

company_edit_cancel.description: Clicking 'Cancelar' closes form and resets editingCompanyId state

elements_verified: Avatar do Apresentador section with Selecionar Foto button

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX CORRECT: pipeline.py line 2609 - FileContent(content_type=content_type, file_content_base64=img_b64) replaces the broken image_url parameter
BUG FIX CORRECT: pipeline.py line 2630 - UserMessage(text=prompt, file_contents=file_contents if file_contents else None) properly passes file contents
EDIT FEATURE: PipelineView.jsx line 910 - editingCompanyId state correctly tracks which company is being edited
EDIT FEATURE: PipelineView.jsx lines 956-976 - startEditCompany, saveEditCompany, cancelCompanyForm functions implemented correctly

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed - 1 timeout on endpoint check, not bug-related)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All company edit features verified, all form elements present)

seed_data_creation: Test company 'Test Company For Edit' created in localStorage for edit testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45: Avatar generation bug FIXED - the endpoint now correctly uses FileContent instead of image_url parameter. Company edit feature working - edit button (data-testid: edit-company-{id}) shows on hover, form pre-fills, 'Atualizar Empresa' saves changes. Companies stored in localStorage under key 'agentzz_companies'. Route: /marketing/studio

rca_of_issue.bug_description: Avatar generation endpoint was failing with 'UserMessage.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument image_url'
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The emergentintegrations library's UserMessage class does not accept an 'image_url' keyword argument. Previous code was trying to pass image URLs directly which is not supported by the API.
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Changed implementation to: 1) Download the source image from URL, 2) Convert to base64, 3) Create FileContent object with content_type and file_content_base64, 4) Pass file_contents list to UserMessage instead of image_url
rca_of_issue.verification: Both text-only and image-to-image avatar generation now work correctly, returning valid Supabase storage URLs
